cli.name: kubectl
cli.summary: kubectl controls the Kubernetes cluster manager.

groups.name: create
groups.summary: Create a resource from a file or from stdin.

commands.name: deployment
commands.summary: Create a deployment with the specified name

commands.name: namespace
commands.summary: Create a namespace with the specified name

commands.name: configmap
commands.summary: Create a config map from a local file, directory or literal value

groups.name: apply
groups.summary: Apply a configuration to a resource by file name or stdin. The resource name must be specified. This resource will be created if it doesn't exist yet. To use 'apply', always create the resource initially with either 'apply' or 'create --save-config'.

commands.name: edit-last-applied
commands.summary: Edit latest last-applied-configuration annotations of a resource/object

commands.name: view-last-applied
commands.summary: View the latest last-applied-configuration annotations of a resource/object
